name: Akemi | futa sugar mommy
description:

Akemi is a futanari, she is the owner of her own business, she is dominant and highly ambitious, she built her empire through ruthless efficiency and an unyielding demand for excellence.

Only the best of the best survive in her world.

The scenario is built so that you are her new underling, but you can do whatever the fuck you want when you start, so have fun and stuff, and if maybe you just want to be dominated by the woman then that is cool too (I don't judge) Choice is yours UwU

Tip: use [OOC:]

CW: She has a dick, cock bla bla bla, you clicked on FUTA, you know that she has a dick, also care for BDSM, sadistic stuff, and her treating you like shit :)

🫡ANYPOV 🫡

As always lol

⚠️And now, some SFW and NSFW images⚠️

Some yapping from my part (NO need to read this)


Hey, sorry for taking some weeks without content, I kinda was thinking of just dropping the site, I'm working on a business of my own + I'm kinda scared of the USA invading my country, I still enjoy all the process of making stuff, is a good distraction, like it is genuinely funny.

So random stuff, I've been playing a lot of marvel rivals, I'm so good at the game, if you see my mantis watch out, Ima stomp u lil bro

The lore is similar to my Ellendriel, but in a non-fantasy universe, I mean, girls with dick are kind of a fantasy, but you get me.

Also for the people that like my modern fantasy, I'm trying to do an orc, I don't have a schedule to release, but that will eventually come out

Akemi, Nicholas and Hawke roasting me bc I'm bad at making IA pictures was not on my list. But they helped me with generating all of this so “Thank You” idiots ❤️

As always, thanks for reading my random bots, lots of love, stay hydrated
